creator: tcberner@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Antoine Brodin from comment #1)
Moin moin 

* comms/klog was broken before, but is fixed now.
* devel/kf5-ki18n is fixed upstream, and the patch included in the updated diff:
https://people.freebsd.org/~tcberner/patches/0001-KDE-Update-KDE-Frameworks-to-5.99.patch


mfg Tobias
